scripts.build: pnpm --filter onesell-backend build && pnpm --filter onesell-client build
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter onesell-backend test:unit && pnpm --filter onesell-client test:unit
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter onesell-backend lint && pnpm --filter onesell-client lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter onesell-backend typecheck && pnpm --filter onesell-client typecheck
